affected_surfaces.note: New 'coderef-pipeline' bin entry; existing entries untouched.
All generate-*.js scripts gain --project-dir flag. Default behavior (no flag) preserved via process.cwd() fallback.
Same output schema (driftPercentage/added/deleted/modified). New computation uses index.generatedAt vs source mtime instead of stored baseline snapshot.
Removes cloud/OpenAI fallback branches. Only Ollama endpoints are accepted. Hard-fails if Ollama unreachable rather than silently degrading.
New section documenting coderef-pipeline usage, flags, and local-only RAG constraint.

risks.description: Drift algorithm change may produce different numbers for the same repo state, breaking any downstream consumer that normalized against the old baseline-snapshot algorithm.
risks.mitigation: Output schema preserved; only the computation is replaced. Phase 3 task P3-003 explicitly tests sanity (0 immediately post-populate, nonzero after a source edit).

risks.description: Removing the OpenAI fallback could break any workflow silently depending on the cloud path when Ollama is misconfigured.
risks.mitigation: P4-003 tests the explicit failure path with clear error messaging. Documented in docs/CLI.md (P7-001). Local-only is a stated user constraint, not a regression.

risks.description: --project-dir flag propagation across 6 doc-gen scripts could miss a write path, causing pollution.
risks.mitigation: P2-003 writes to a temp scratch project and asserts zero files land outside it. P6-002 verifies on a real external project (LLOYD).

risks.description: Unified CLI leg-order (scan -> populate -> foundation-docs -> RAG) is opinionated; some users may want to skip legs.
risks.mitigation: Design P5-001 to accept a --only=<leg,leg> or --skip=<leg,leg> flag. Default behavior runs all four.

test_strategy: Phase 3: drift sanity test immediately post-populate and after forced source edit (P3-003).
Phase 4: local-only RAG failure-mode test with OPENAI_API_KEY set but Ollama unreachable (P4-003).
commit_strategy: One commit per phase (7 total). Close commit optional per /close-workorder canonical flow.
